allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\src\\license-manager" -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $path = $_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\("D:\\src\\license-manager"\), ""; $indent = \($_.FullName | Measure-Object -Character | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Characters\) - \($_.Name | Measure-Object -Character | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Characters\); if \($_.PSIsContainer\) { "DIR:  " + $path } else { "FILE: " + $path } } | Sort-Object)
